recent_projects.name: spikard
recent_projects.summary: High-performance Python web framework with a Rust core. Build REST APIs, WebSockets, and SSE services with FastAPI/Litestar-style decorators backed by Axum and Tower-HTTP. 2.8x faster than FastAPI.
